title: JSA, TT&A advise LeapFrog on $95 million investment in ReNew Green Energy
description: A LeapFrog Investments Group, Ltd.-led consortium has made a $95 million investment in ReNew Green Energy Solutions Private Limited.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised LeapFrog on their investment in ReNew.The JSA Corporate team was led by Sidharrth Shankar (Partner), and included Nandini Seth (Partner), Shringarika Priyadarshini (Partner) and Aditya Vardhan Dayal (Partner), with support from Rishika Agarwal (Senior Associate), Pranav Rao N (Senior Associate), Associates Aditya Sinha and Aash
